name: NICE RPA
description: NICE (NEVA) — RPA + attended automation platform focused on contact centers and back-office. Combines virtual attendants with process discovery.

seo.title: NICE RPA — Data Integration / ETL / Reverse ETL
seo.meta_description: NICE RPA: NICE (NEVA) — RPA + attended automation platform focused on contact centers and back-office. Combines virtual attendants with process discovery.

when_to_use: Attended desktop automation for contact center agents
RPA bots handling repetitive tasks in customer service ops
Virtual attendant combining AI guidance with RPA workflows
Back-office process automation for call center operations
Employee-facing automation reducing handle time in CX

pros: Attended automation with NEVA virtual attendant
Deep integration with NICE CX stack
cons: Strongest value tied to NICE CX customers
Less appealing outside contact center context
review.verdict: Best RPA pick for NICE contact-center shops; unremarkable versus UiPath for general-purpose automation.
review.best_for: Contact center ops teams already using NICE's CX suite
review.not_for: General-purpose automation teams outside NICE's customer base

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales alone is insufficient evidence
